driver = <selenium.webdriver.chrome.webdriver.WebDriver (session="b5fce3ca652a2c9e764999fe0dbe63b5")>

    @pytest.mark.smoke
    @allure.title("TC02 - Create Order Flow")
    def test_create_order(driver):
    
        order = OrderModule(driver)
    
        with allure.step("Open Orders Page"):
            order.open_orders(
                "https://app-hire-x-dev-multi-tenant-angular-01-bkgee7ewapa0c5es.southeastasia-01.azurewebsites.net/supplier/orders"
            )
    
        with allure.step("Create Order Flow"):
            order.click_new_order()
            order.verify_create_form()
            order.select_random_customer()
            order.click_create()
    
        with allure.step("Add Product"):
>           order.add_product("Set", 2)

tests\test_order.py:26: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

self = <modules.order_module.OrderModule object at 0x0000014A87157CB0>, product_name = 'Set', quantity = 2

    def add_product(self, product_name, quantity):
    
        with allure.step(f"Add Product - {product_name}"):
    
            self._wait_ui_ready()
    
            # product input
            product_input = self.wait.until(
                EC.element_to_be_clickable(
                    self.page.PRODUCT_INPUT
                )
            )
    
            self.driver.execute_script(
                "arguments[0].scrollIntoView({block:'center'});",
                product_input
            )
    
            product_input.clear()
            product_input.send_keys(product_name)
    
            # select first option
            first_option = self.wait.until(
                EC.element_to_be_clickable(
                    self.page.PRODUCT_OPTIONS
                )
            )
    
            self.driver.execute_script(
                "arguments[0].click();",
                first_option
            )
    
            # IMPORTANT WAIT
            self._wait_ui_ready()
    
            # quantity
            qty_input = self.wait.until(
                EC.visibility_of_element_located(
                    self.page.QUANTITY_INPUT
                )
            )
    
            qty_input.clear()
            qty_input.send_keys(str(quantity))
    
            # IMPORTANT WAIT
            self._wait_ui_ready()
    
            # re-find add button
            add_btn = self.wait.until(
                EC.presence_of_element_located(
                    self.page.ADD_BUTTON
                )
            )
    
            self.driver.execute_script(
                "arguments[0].scrollIntoView({block:'center'});",
                add_btn
            )
    
            # wait spinner gone again
            self._wait_ui_ready()
    
            try:
                self.wait.until(
                    EC.element_to_be_clickable(
                        self.page.ADD_BUTTON
                    )
                ).click()
    
            except:
    
                # JS CLICK FALLBACK
                self.driver.execute_script(
                    "arguments[0].click();",
                    add_btn
                )
    
            # wait product appear
            self.wait.until(
                EC.presence_of_element_located(
                    (
                        By.XPATH,
                        f"//*[contains(text(),'{product_name}')]"
                    )
                )
            )
    
            self._wait_ui_ready()
    
    # ---------------- STATUS ----------------
    
    
        self._wait_ui_ready()
    
        time.sleep(2)
    
        status_btn = self.wait.until(
            EC.element_to_be_clickable(
                (
                    By.XPATH,
                    "//button[contains(@class,'dropdown-toggle')]"
                )
            )
        )
    
        self.driver.execute_script(
            "arguments[0].click();",
            status_btn
        )
    
        options = self.wait.until(
            EC.presence_of_all_elements_located(
>               self.page.STATUS_OPTIONS
            )
        )
E       AttributeError: 'OrderPage' object has no attribute 'STATUS_OPTIONS'
